mapper.update: UPDATE setting SET shop_name = #{shopName}, contact_email = #{contactEmail}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, shop_address = #{shopAddress}, shop_description = #{shopDescription}, is_open = #{isOpen}, business_start_time = #{startTime}, business_end_time = #{endTime}, ai_agent_enabled = #{aiStart}, created_at= NOW(), updated_at = NOW() where id=1
mapper.select: SELECT id, shop_name AS shopName, contact_email AS contactEmail, contact_phone AS contactPhone, shop_address AS shopAddress, shop_description AS shopDescription, is_open AS isOpen, business_start_time AS startTime, business_end_time AS endTime, ai_agent_enabled AS aiStart, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM setting WHERE id = 1
